creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: culot
Date: Sat Jan 18 07:37:14 2014
New Revision: 340146
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/340146
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r340146/

Log:
  - Support staging [1]
  - Add LICENSE (Artistic 1 & GPL 1)
  
  PR:		ports/185731 [1]
  Submitted by:	Matthew D. Fuller <fullermd@over-yonder.net> (maintainer)

Modified:
  head/textproc/p5-Text-WikiCreole/Makefile
  head/textproc/p5-Text-WikiCreole/pkg-plist

Modified: head/textproc/p5-Text-WikiCreole/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/textproc/p5-Text-WikiCreole/Makefile	Sat Jan 18 02:49:11 2014	(r340145)
+++ head/textproc/p5-Text-WikiCreole/Makefile	Sat Jan 18 07:37:14 2014	(r340146)
@@ -10,10 +10,10 @@ PKGNAMEPREFIX=		p5-
 MAINTAINER=		fullermd@over-yonder.net
 COMMENT=	Implementation of the Wiki Creole markup language
 
+LICENSE=	ART10 GPLv1
+LICENSE_COMB=	dual
+
 USES=		perl5
 USE_PERL5=	configure
 
-MAN3=			Text::WikiCreole.3
-
-NO_STAGE=	yes
 .include <bsd.port.mk>

Modified: head/textproc/p5-Text-WikiCreole/pkg-plist
==============================================================================
--- head/textproc/p5-Text-WikiCreole/pkg-plist	Sat Jan 18 02:49:11 2014	(r340145)
+++ head/textproc/p5-Text-WikiCreole/pkg-plist	Sat Jan 18 07:37:14 2014	(r340146)
@@ -1,5 +1,6 @@
 %%SITE_PERL%%/%%PERL_ARCH%%/auto/Text/WikiCreole/.packlist
 %%SITE_PERL%%/Text/WikiCreole.pm
+%%PERL5_MAN3%%/Text::WikiCreole.3.gz
 @dirrmtry %%SITE_PERL%%/Text
 @dirrmtry %%SITE_PERL%%/%%PERL_ARCH%%/auto/Text/WikiCreole
 @dirrmtry %%SITE_PERL%%/%%PERL_ARCH%%/auto/Text
